product.description: Defines the name of the product

startDate.description: The startDate from which the data is required in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format

endDate.description: The endDate until which the data is fetched in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format

jobID.description: Unique id to get the xml files for the requested date

status.description: Defines the status of the request

url.description: Link to download the zip file which contains xml files

part.description: Returns the part number of the jobID
